title: More Recipes and more
description: Adds recipes, ores, tools, food and sometimes biomes
body:
This mod contains tools made of vanilla materials that do not have tools like copper, amethyst etc. 
Also, it has Blocks made of materials that don't have their own block, recipes that do not take place in vanilla minecraft, and new advancements that have the new tools in use.
Some tools have a feature, like: Lapis is very enchantible, Ender is better than netherite...

There are also 8 custom ores, which are Tin(iron mining level), Ruby, Onyx, Alexandrite(diamond mining level), Lead, Bismuth, Polonium and Uranium(Netherite mining level)

While Tin, Ruby, Onyx and Alexandrite are found underground in caves, the other 4 ores are found in new structures called Meteors - there being a regular and a mini one - which are guarded by Inhumane Beings(new entities) and found in the Ender2.0 biome. Inhumane Beings are equipped with Toxic Sticks and a Toxic Chestplate each. They apply the Toxicity effect on collision, which slightly reduces damage and jump height.

Lead can be traded with Piglins much like gold. Bismuth can be used with Netherite sticks to make tools. Polonium and Uranium can make a Toxic Stick and a Toxic Chastplate. Using lapis and redstone, you can also make an Enhanced Toxic Stick(a bit stronger). With lead and a Toxic Stick, you can make the Toxic Sword.

The mod also contains some foods like Roasted seeds, apple pie, grilled cheese, etc.  + 2 drinks; tea and cocoa

 

## AND   the Nether wart block to Nether Wart Recipe, the prismarine crystals to sea lantern recipe, trident recipe (3 quartz, 3 prismarine crystals and 1 diamond)
 

_NOTE: Some tools need iron or golden sticks - only ender tools require diamond sticks_
